mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, book_id, book_title, book_author, current_page, total_pages, progress_percent, last_read_at, created_at FROM reading_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_read_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_progress (user_id, book_id, book_title, book_author, current_page, total_pages, progress_percent) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{bookTitle}, #{bookAuthor}, #{currentPage}, #{totalPages}, #{progressPercent})
